debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
inst✝ : CommRing R
ι : Type
I : ι → Ideal R
⊢ Injective ⇑(@Ideal.chineseMap R inst✝ ι I)

failed_attempts:
intro x y hxy
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective x with ⟨x', rfl⟩
  rcases Quotient.mk_surjective y with ⟨y', rfl⟩
  rw [chineseMap_mk, chineseMap_mk] at hxy
  have : ∀ i, Quotient.mk (I i) x' = Quotient.mk (I i) y' := fun i ↦ congr_fun hxy i
  have : ∀ i, x' - y' ∈ I i := fun i ↦ Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.mp (by rw [← sub_eq_zero]; simpa using this i)
  have : x' - y' ∈ ⨅ i, I i := mem_iInf.2 this
  exact Quotient.eq_zero_iff_mem.1 this
